help.apiKey: API keys are managed in the dashboard settings

empty.title: No Deployments Found
empty.description: Create your first deployment to get started

backups.title: Backups
backups.noBackupsDesc: Create your first backup to protect your deployment data.

schedule.title: Schedule Automatic Backup
schedule.name: Schedule Name
schedule.retentionHint: Number of backups to keep (older backups will be deleted)

delete.title: Delete Backup
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmTask: Are you sure you want to delete this scheduled task?

restore.title: Restore Backup
restore.confirm: Are you sure you want to restore from backup "{id}"? This will stop the deployment, restore data, and restart it.

notification.taskStartedDesc: Backup task execution has been initiated

files.noFilesDesc: Upload files or create folders to get started

delete.title: Confirm Delete
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
delete.warning: This will delete all contents inside the folder.

editor.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close?

proxy.disableSSLTitle: Disable SSL and revert to HTTP

detail.configureDomainHint: Click the edit button to configure domain exposure

status.connectionClosed: Connection closed. Click Connect to reconnect.
status.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Check if container is running.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.subtitle: Execute predefined commands on your deployment
quickActions.noActions: No quick actions configured for this deployment.
quickActions.createHint: Click "Add Action" to create your first quick action.

security.addPathsHint: Click presets above or add custom paths
security.addLimitsHint: Add limits to protect against abuse
security.eventsHint: Security events for this deployment will appear here

delete.title: Delete Deployment
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
delete.deleteDatabaseHint: Remove associated database and user (if using shared database)

pullImage.title: Pull Images
pullImage.noImages: No pullable images found in this deployment.
pullImage.latestWarning: Images tagged as :latest or without a tag may change over time. Pulling will overwrite existing images with the newest version, which may change the behavior of your deployment.
pullImage.versionedInfo: Versioned images (e.g., nginx:1.25.3) are immutable. Re-pulling them is usually unnecessary.

rebuild.title: Rebuild Containers
rebuild.description: Rebuilding will stop all running containers, remove them, and create new ones using the currently available images. This is useful after pulling new images.
rebuild.whenToUseHint: After pulling new images with "Pull Image", use rebuild to apply the changes. A simple restart does not use newly pulled images.

domainSettings.title: Domain & SSL Settings
domainSettings.exposeHint: Enable reverse proxy for external access
domainSettings.domainHint: The domain name for your deployment
domainSettings.containerPortHint: The port your application listens on

credential.title: Registry Credential
credential.description: Select a saved registry credential to use when pulling images for this deployment.
credential.hint: This credential will be used when pulling images on restart or update.

quickAction.name: Name
quickAction.nameHint: A descriptive name for the action
quickAction.commandHint: The shell command to execute in the container
quickAction.descriptionHint: Optional description of what this action does
quickAction.iconHint: Icon to display for this action
quickAction.targetServiceHint: Container to run the command in

deleteEnv.title: Delete Environment Variable
deleteEnv.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete '{key}'?

config.serviceConfigNotFound: Service configuration not found\nThis file will be created when you save

notification.sslRequestedSuccess: SSL certificate for {domain} has been requested
notification.securityVhostUpdated: Security configuration updated and nginx vhost regenerated
notification.domainAddedSuccess: {domain} has been added to this deployment

hint.stripPrefix: If enabled, /api/users will be sent to the backend as /users
hint.additionalAliases: Additional domain names that should also resolve here

confirmDelete.title: Delete Domain
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete {domain}?

newDeployment.title: Create Deployment
newDeployment.subtitle: Deploy your application in just a few steps

mode.title: How would you like to deploy?
mode.subtitle: Choose the deployment method that works best for you

compose.title: Compose Mode
compose.multiServiceDesc: Define multiple services, volumes, and networks
compose.multiDomainDesc: Route different domains to different services
compose.nextStepHint: You'll write your compose file in the next step

image.title: Docker Image
image.imageHint: Docker Hub, GHCR, or any registry
image.composeHint: A compose file will be auto-generated for your image

database.title: Database
database.rootPasswordHint: Leave empty to use same as password
database.envHint: Environment variables will be automatically added to your app
database.stackHint: This database service will be added to your compose stack

domains.title: Configure Domains
domains.subtitle: Route different domains to different services in your compose stack
domains.serviceHint: Service name from your compose file

configure.hostPortTitle: Host port (leave empty for expose only)
configure.portHint: Container:Host - leave host empty to expose only

validation.nameFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed
validation.nameExists: A deployment with this name already exists

unknown.infoTitle: These are requests to domains not matching any configured deployment:
unknown.infoDns: Misconfigured DNS pointing to your IP

blockModal.title: Block IP Address
blockModal.message: Block all requests from {ip}? This will take effect immediately.
blockModal.reason: Blocked from traffic dashboard - suspicious activity

empty.title: No security events
empty.hint: Security events will appear here when detected

empty.title: No blocked IPs
empty.hint: Blocked IP addresses will appear here

empty.title: No protected routes
empty.hint: Add routes to apply rate limiting

health.title: Security Health Status
health.empty: Click refresh to check security health status
health.scriptsHint: Regenerates Lua scripts with current agent IP and reloads nginx

realtimeCapture.title: Realtime Event Capture
realtimeCapture.description: Enable real-time security event capture using OpenResty/Lua. When enabled, security events are captured as they happen instead of being parsed from logs. This provides faster detection and more accurate event data.
realtimeCapture.activeNote: Realtime capture is active. Security events will be sent directly from nginx to the agent API. Make sure your nginx container is using the OpenResty image.
realtimeCapture.disabledNote: Realtime capture is disabled. Security features like IP blocking and rate limiting will still work, but events will only be captured when logs are parsed.

moduleStatus.title: Security Module Status
moduleStatus.description: The security module handles event storage, IP blocking, and rate limiting configuration.

deleteRoute.title: Delete Protected Route
deleteRoute.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the route

notifications.realtimeEnabledDesc: Security events will now be captured in realtime using OpenResty/Lua
